subcodes.first_line: O friends! Today the Most Great Luminary giveth glad-tidings unto the people of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان امروز نیر اعظم اهل عالم را بشارت میدهد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
